mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary (user_id, title, date, content, mood_key, content_format, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{date}, #{content}, #{moodKey}, #{contentFormat}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE diary SET title = #{title}, date = #{date}, content = #{content}, mood_key = #{moodKey}, content_format = #{contentFormat} WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
